Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

It would be good to have that exercised in one of the existing sanity-sec tests.

Also, I am wondering if we should use a new option to grok the param=value syntax (or no named option?), instead of overloading '--property'? It just feels weird to me that way, but maybe this is just because I am not used to it yet :)
Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> (2 comments)
> 
> It would be good to have that exercised in one of the existing sanity-sec tests.
> 
> Also, I am wondering if we should use a new option to grok the param=value syntax (or no named option?), instead of overloading '--property'? It just feels weird to me that way, but maybe this is just because I am not used to it yet :)

Sorry, I missed your general comment. I was wondering the same. Personally, I would prefer it to be a positional parameter, but then having to specify --name in addition to a positional parameter feels odd, too... (I see positional parameters as mandatory, but in this case, both positional and named parameters would be mandatory).

Will change something in sanity-sec.

parents.subject: LU-18454 utils: 'lfs migrate' can read filenames from file

commit.subject: LU-18524 utils: Improve lctl nodemap_modify interface
commit.message:
LU-18524 utils: Improve lctl nodemap_modify interface

"lctl nodemap_modify" uses two separate parameters for the property
name and the corresponding value. This patch slightly improves this
interface by allowing "=value" as part of --property similar to "lctl
set_param" commands:

lctl nodemap_modify --name nm_0 --property admin=1

instead of (which is still allowed):

lctl nodemap_modify --name nm_0 --property admin --value 1

sanity-sec fileset_test_setup() was modified to exercise this
interface.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec
Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I030e1602a67c066e6daf4187589a77c1b49ee855
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/57448
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
